title: Ragdollified
description: A ragdoll mod for 1.20.1 with more compatibility and features than normal
body: **Thank you to [AdInVas](https://www.curseforge.com/members/adinvas) for letting me use Prototype: Physics as a base for these death ragdolls** ### This mod is currently in Beta; please expect bugs   **_No known incompatibilities (crashes)_** Ragdollified is a mod that adds ragdolls to the player, zombies, skeletons, creepers, cows, sheep, pigs, and chickens. Every update until full release will add a new mob or multiple. * Compat for EMF and ETF (Example: Tissou's Zombie Pack) * Config for how many ragdolls exist per world and at once in general * Damage type-based damage (later will be configurable) * Compat with some geckolib armors *** **Report bugs or join for fun in the Zarra Studios Discord here: [https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW](https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW)** *** **Plans:** * **Fix ragdolls not updating after ground breaks beneath them** ✔ * **Add the rest of the vanilla mobs** * **Make everything more configurable** * **Make a client-side version** ✔ *** A mod developed by Zarra Studios Please report bugs to the Discord or GitHub. **Code is open-sourced (MIT)** **Check out the mod by AdlnVas here:** **[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/prototype-physics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/prototype-physics)** *** [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/939863205621137458.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2)](https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW) [![links](https://img.shields.io/badge/more-links-ff69b4.svg)](https://allmylinks.com/raiiiden) [![Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Patreon-Support-orange.svg?logo=Patreon)](https://www.patreon.com/c/ZarraModpacks) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache_2.0-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/Apache-2.0)
